title: meehania henryi
intro: Meehania henryi, also known as Henry's Meehania, is a perennial plant native to China, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of compounds such as ursolic acid and rosmarinic acid. Meehania henryi is believed to offer various health benefits, including the potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
